title: Tempo of Sequence
description: The Tempo of Sequence exists as the law of order itself. First. Then. After. The order cannot be violated.

lines: The Tempo of Sequence was not fast. It was simply prior.
It had been here before the party arrived. Before the world existed. Before the concept of arrival. It was the thing that made before mean before and after mean after.
When it spoke, it was already the second time it had spoken. You had simply not been present for the first.

lines.speaker: Tempo of Sequence
lines.text: First. Then. After. The order cannot be violated.

lines.speaker: Tempo of Sequence
lines.text: Nothing. That is what before means. Before me, there is no order. There is no time. There is no sequence in which your question could be asked.

lines.speaker: Tempo of Sequence
lines.text: You have arrived after every other party that has tried this world. You have arrived before the ones who will come next. You are a middle state. All things pass through me to become a middle state.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: You've seen parties after us? You know parties will come?

lines.speaker: Tempo of Sequence
lines.text: I know all positions in the sequence. I am the sequence. You are position seven hundred and forty-three. This information is not useful to you. It is accurate.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: Have any of the other seven hundred and forty-two passed you?

lines.speaker: Tempo of Sequence
lines.text: No. They are all prior. Prior means behind. You are the current state. The current state is the only state in which passing is possible. First: acknowledge the sequence. Then: proceed. After: you will know whether you passed.
